prompt: A single [product color] [product type] floating in a pure white void, soft directional shadow beneath it, slow 360-degree rotation, ultra-sharp texture detail on [material detail], clean [brand aesthetic] aesthetic, 16:9
tool_notes: On Pika add 'smooth rotation'. Luma handles reflective surfaces cleanly. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A [product type] on a [surface material] surface, single overhead light casting a precise shadow, slow camera orbit around the product, hyper-realistic [material detail], minimal and [mood] feel, 16:9
tool_notes: Kling handles glass refraction well. Add 'photorealistic product' on Runway. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A [vehicle type] driving on a [road type] at [time of day], low angle tracking shot keeping pace with the vehicle, [atmospheric detail] kicking up behind tires, warm dramatic lighting, cinematic color grade, 16:9
tool_notes: Luma excels at vehicle motion. Add 'tracking shot' explicitly on Runway. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A [drink type] being poured in slow motion, [ice detail], [liquid color] liquid splashing in beautiful detail, [surface type] surface, warm [light color] lighting, cinematic macro photography style, 16:9
tool_notes: Kling handles liquid dynamics well. On Runway use 'slow motion pour'. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A [product type] floating in the middle of [surreal environment], [atmospheric element] swirling slowly around it, the product glowing softly from within, surreal dreamlike scale contrast, cinematic and otherworldly, 16:9

surreal environment.default: a galaxy with stars and nebula

tool_notes: Sora excels at surreal scale and space environments. Add 'photorealistic' on Runway. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A slow-motion close-up of a [subject] on a [location] at [time of day], [light description] wrapping around their face, shallow depth of field, warm cinematic color grade, handheld camera feel, Instagram Reels format 9:16
tool_notes: On Pika add 'smooth motion'. On Kling specify '6 seconds'. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio.

prompt: A [subject] in extreme slow motion, [atmospheric detail] rising dramatically, [background description] with bokeh [light type], cinematic 24fps feel, vertical 9:16 format, rich [color palette] tones
tool_notes: Use 'slow motion' keyword explicitly on Pika for best results. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio.

prompt: A [scene description] in the [decade], handheld VHS camcorder aesthetic, washed-out [color tone] colors, scan lines and film grain overlay, timestamp in corner, warm nostalgic feel, 9:16 vertical

scene description.default: group of friends at a backyard summer party
examples: birthday party at a roller rink

tool_notes: Add 'VHS grain overlay' on Runway for stronger retro effect.

prompt: An anime-style [character description] running through a [environment], [atmospheric element] swirling in slow motion, soft [color palette] color palette, [art style] aesthetic, gentle camera pan, 9:16 vertical
tool_notes: Kling handles anime style consistently. On Luma add 'Studio Ghibli' as style reference.

prompt: Anime-style [location] at [time of day], [character count] characters [activity], [background element] glowing [color] behind them, wind blowing through hair, emotional and cinematic, 9:16 vertical format

activity.default: sitting on the edge of a building

tool_notes: Specify 'flat anime shading' on Runway to avoid 3D look.

prompt: A [character description] sitting alone at a [location] at [time], [atmospheric element] hitting the window behind them, soft [light source] casting colored shadows, handheld camera slowly orbiting, melancholic and silent, 16:9
tool_notes: Luma handles atmospheric lighting well. Add 'handheld camera drift' on Runway. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A [character description] standing at [dramatic location], [clothing detail] in the wind, wide establishing shot slowly zooming out to reveal the vast scale, [sky description], emotional and powerful, 16:9

dramatic location.default: the edge of a cliff overlooking a stormy ocean

tool_notes: Sora excels at wide environmental shots. Use 'slow zoom out reveal' on Runway. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

nostalgic scene.default: home video of a family road trip

family members.default: kids faces pressed against car window

prompt: An anime [scene type], a [character description] [action], [atmospheric element] drifting across the frame, soft [art style] aesthetic, emotional [music mood] score implied, slow fade to [color], 16:9

character description.default: young child standing in a sunlit field

prompt: A [character description] blowing out [celebration detail] in slow motion, [background description] in soft bokeh, [light source] glow, joyful and intimate, close-up on the [subject focus] as light extinguishes, cinematic and nostalgic, 16:9

prompt: A sweeping aerial drone shot over [historical or fantasy setting], [population detail] in the streets, [landmark description], [light quality], epic and majestic, 16:9

historical or fantasy setting.default: an ancient Roman city at its peak

landmark description.default: the Colosseum towering in the distance
examples: a great cathedral dominating the skyline

prompt: A [landscape type] at [time of day], [atmospheric effect] rolling between [natural features], a single [detail element] catching the first light, [wildlife detail], slow aerial glide forward, breathtaking natural beauty, 16:9

prompt: A rain-soaked [location type] at night, neon signs in [language/style] reflecting in puddles, steam rising from grates, [character detail] walking away from camera, atmospheric and moody, slow push in, 16:9

character detail.default: a lone figure with an umbrella

tool_notes: Kling handles neon reflections on wet surfaces cleanly. Add 'Blade Runner 2049 mood' on Runway. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: An anime-style [settlement type] nestled in a [natural setting], [architectural detail] with [atmospheric detail], a [activity description], soft [light quality], [art style] warmth and detail, slow pan across, 16:9
tool_notes: Luma captures Ghibli environmental warmth. Kling maintains consistent anime style. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

tool_notes: Sora handles large-scale sci-fi cityscapes best. Use 'cyberpunk megacity descent' on Luma. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. Higgsfield's Cinema Studio gives precise camera keyframe control for this shot.

prompt: A single [line type] slowly drawing itself across a [background], transforming into a [pattern type], clean and hypnotic, smooth and precise animation, perfect loop, 16:9
tool_notes: Runway handles minimalist animation cleanly. Specify 'perfect loop' on Pika.

prompt: An infinite [architectural element] folding in on itself like an M.C. Escher painting brought to life, [surface texture], small figures walking in impossible directions, slow and hypnotic camera rotation, 16:9
tool_notes: Sora handles impossible geometry best. On Runway use 'Escher architectural loop'.

prompt: Neon light tubes bending and morphing into abstract flowing shapes against a pure black background, electric [color palette] colors, smooth fluid motion, hypnotic and loopable, [music genre] energy, 16:9
tool_notes: Kling handles neon glow effects cleanly. Specify 'loopable neon fluid art' on Runway.

prompt: A [object] standing alone in [impossible environment], slowly opening to reveal a completely different world inside — a [contrasting world] — camera slowly pushes through, impossible portal concept, cinematic and dreamlike, 16:9
tool_notes: Sora handles portal and world-transition concepts exceptionally well.

prompt: Fractal patterns growing and evolving in deep space, [color palette] colors, infinite zoom feeling, [aesthetic style] and mathematical beauty, smooth continuous camera push-in, loopable, 16:9
tool_notes: Sora handles infinite zoom concepts. On Runway use 'fractal zoom cyberpunk colors'.

prompt: A photorealistic AI [role] behind a [set description], speaking directly to camera, [backdrop detail], [personality trait] and [tone] presentation style, cinematic talking head format, 16:9

backdrop detail.default: neutral professional studio backdrop with subtle screen graphics

tool_notes: Luma maintains face consistency. Add 'professional broadcast' on Runway. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. HeyGen excels here — specify avatar expression and background scene for best results.

prompt: A photorealistic AI [character type] standing in a [environment], [light description], [outfit description], speaking naturally with subtle hand gestures, [personality] and [quality], 16:9
tool_notes: Kling handles natural body movement. Specify 'natural gesture' on Runway. Google Veo 3.1 handles this well and auto-generates matching audio. HeyGen excels here — specify avatar expression and background scene for best results.

prompt: An anime [character archetype] standing still in a [environment], [natural element] moving gently, [light quality] filtering through, [expression description], slow dramatic zoom, highly detailed character design, 16:9
tool_notes: Kling maintains anime character consistency. Use 'anime dramatic zoom' on Luma. HeyGen excels here — specify avatar expression and background scene for best results.

prompt: A sleek AI assistant avatar rendered as a glowing [form type], [color palette] light forming a human silhouette, [particle detail] flowing around the body, appearing on a [background], futuristic and [mood], 16:9
tool_notes: Luma handles holographic light figures cleanly. Use 'holographic AI avatar' on Runway. HeyGen excels here — specify avatar expression and background scene for best results.

prompt: An anime [character type] in a long coat standing in a [weather condition] [location] at night, looking [direction] pensively, [atmospheric lighting] reflecting in puddles around them, [mood] atmosphere, slow camera push-in on face, 16:9

prompt: A [product type] displayed on a [surface] in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, neon [brand colors] reflections all around it, [atmospheric element] drifting past, dramatic low angle hero shot, 16:9
tool_notes: Kling handles neon reflections on wet surfaces cleanly. Add 'Blade Runner atmosphere' on Runway.

prompt: Anime-style advertisement for [product type] — a [character description] discovers the product, [reaction] in exaggerated anime style, [visual effect] bursting around the product, bright [color palette], energetic and fun, 9:16 or 16:9

reaction.default: eyes sparkling with stars and mouth wide open

prompt: A single [subject] against a pure [background color] background, slow [camera move], [one subtle action] in perfect stillness, hyper-clean aesthetic, satisfying and meditative, 9:16 vertical

subject.default: hand holding a single white flower
examples: ceramic cup being slowly filled with coffee

one subtle action.default: single petal falling in slow motion

prompt: A [person type] opens a door in the middle of [impossible location] and steps through into [contrasting world], camera slowly pulls back to reveal the surreal contrast, 9:16 vertical

examples: the middle of a snowy mountain
a quiet Japanese garden in spring
a cozy library on a rainy evening

tool_notes: Sora handles portal world-transitions exceptionally well. Add 'seamless surreal transition' on Runway.

prompt: A [influencer type] filming a [content type] on a [camera type] in the [decade], jump cuts and DIY energy, [color grade] color, authentic lo-fi creator vibe, 9:16 vertical
tool_notes: Pika handles VHS jump cuts well. Add 'authentic DIY camcorder look' on Kling.

prompt: A single [character] in a vast empty [environment], camera slowly pulling back to emphasise isolation, [light condition], no dialogue, pure visual storytelling, 16:9

examples: elderly person with a walking stick

tool_notes: Runway handles isolation framing cleanly. Add 'wide angle slow pull back single subject' on Luma.

prompt: A [character] walks into a mirror and continues walking — the mirror world is [mirror world description] — the character doesn't notice the difference, dreamlike and unsettling, slow push-in, 16:9

mirror world description.default: identical but with wrong colors, reversed shadows, and impossible gravity
examples: the same room but decades earlier, dust on everything and children's drawings on the walls
perfectly beautiful but utterly silent — no wind, no movement, no sound except the character's footsteps

tool_notes: Sora handles impossible world transitions. Add 'surreal mirror world continuity' on Runway.

prompt: A [character type] with [augmentation] navigating a rain-soaked cyberpunk [environment] at night, [camera movement], neon [color palette] reflections everywhere, [emotional state] implied through body language, cinematic and moody, 16:9
tool_notes: Kling handles wet surface neon reflections. Add 'neo-noir tracking shot' on Runway.

prompt: A world where [physical rule] works in reverse — [specific example] — inhabitants going about daily life as if completely normal, wide observational shot, surreal and quietly absurd, 16:9

specific example.default: people and objects fall upward, rain rises from puddles to sky, buildings grow downward from floating ground above
examples: everything moves in reverse — people walk backward, broken objects repair themselves, conversations play in reverse
all large things are tiny and all tiny things are enormous — ants tower over skyscrapers, people are microscopic next to insects

tool_notes: Sora handles impossible physics scenarios best. Specify 'surreal reversed world documentary style' on Runway.

prompt: A single [natural element] in a vast empty [environment type], [camera movement], [light condition], nothing else in frame, meditative and powerful, 16:9

light condition.default: flat overcast with single warm horizon glow
examples: harsh midday sun with hard long shadow

tool_notes: Runway handles minimalist environment composition. Add 'single subject vast landscape' on Luma.

tool_notes: Pika handles VHS travel documentary style. Add 'vintage travel film grain' on Runway.
